in-struct-not-registered.safetyEnabled: used internally by firmware to gate safety-stop watchdog; not externally tunable via SET (toggled by SAFE command instead)
in-struct-not-registered.tlmFields: set by STREAM command handler directly, not via ConfigRegistry SET; bitmask is not a persistent tuning param
in-struct-not-registered.tlmSnapPending: ephemeral one-shot flag set by SNAP command and cleared after one TLM frame; not a persistent config field
in-struct-not-registered.fwdSignL: motor direction sign set at construction time from robot JSON; runtime SET would not re-wire the HAL constructors
in-struct-not-registered.fwdSignR: motor direction sign set at construction time from robot JSON; runtime SET would not re-wire the HAL constructors
in-struct-not-registered.odomUpsideDown: OTOS mounting orientation flag read at construction time; runtime SET would not re-init the sensor — register when live re-init is supported
in-struct-not-registered.ekfQxy: EKF position process-noise covariance; used by initEKF at startup — register as tunable in a future sprint
in-struct-not-registered.ekfQtheta: EKF heading process-noise covariance; used by initEKF at startup — register as tunable in a future sprint
in-struct-not-registered.ekfROtosXy: EKF OTOS position measurement-noise covariance; used by initEKF at startup — register as tunable in a future sprint
in-struct-not-registered.ekfQv: EKF velocity process-noise covariance; used by initEKF at startup — register as tunable in a future sprint
in-struct-not-registered.ekfQomega: EKF yaw-rate process-noise covariance; used by initEKF at startup — register as tunable in a future sprint
in-struct-not-registered.ekfROtosV: EKF OTOS velocity measurement-noise covariance; used by initEKF at startup — register as tunable in a future sprint
in-struct-not-registered.ekfREncV: EKF encoder velocity measurement-noise covariance; used by initEKF at startup — register as tunable in a future sprint
